summary: First test run of Axiom Ledger. Backend: 39/39 pytest passing (auth, roles, CoA, txns, AI categorize, rules apply_to_existing recategorizes, 5 report JSONs + 5 PDFs w/ %PDF header, JE creation, mock Plaid/Veryfi returning correct data, all generic list endpoints). Frontend: client demo login, company switcher (Skyward Sparks), sidebar/AI panel toggles, transactions page (92 rows), reports index, income statement w/ export button + revenue/expense sections, chart of accounts, rules page (AI/Human badges), AI chat streaming a real response (Claude Sonnet 4.5) all working.

issues: Assistant reply says 'I don't have access to your accounting data' although the /api/ai/chat/stream endpoint accepts company_id and could inject computed report snapshots — consider strengthening the system prompt / context injection so the AI can actually answer revenue/expense questions using the same numbers the dashboard already displays ($91,650 revenue is right there)

action_items: (Optional polish) Inject computed financial context (revenue/expense totals or recent txns) into AI chat system prompt so answers stop saying 'I don't have access to your data'.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1256 lines — consider splitting into routers per resource (transactions, reports, rules, onboarding, generic-crud) for maintainability.
reportTile testId is templated as `report-tile-{key}` and txn bulk-approve is only rendered when rows are selected — that's fine functionally; testers should use prefix selectors.
MongoDB _id exclusion appears handled via coerce() — verified via JSON responses; no ObjectId leakage observed.
test_credentials: Uses /app/memory/test_credentials.md (client@axiom.ai / client123, pro@axiom.ai / pro123, admin@axiom.ai / admin123, client2@axiom.ai / client123)
seed_data_creation: Test creates one TEST_ prefixed transaction via /api/companies/{cid}/transactions and one rule using an existing merchant on the Skyward Sparks seed company. No cleanup implemented — negligible pollution; existing seed remains intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, parallel with xdist, ~25s). Reruns all 39 tests. Reports XML at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Frontend tested via Playwright against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All requested flows in the review_request pass; no functional bugs found.
